sentences.arabic: زُرْنَا مَتْحَفَ التَّارِيخِ فِي وَسَطِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Posjetili smo historijski muzej u centru grada.
sentences.translationEn: We visited the history museum in the city centre.
We bought entrance tickets at the door.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمَتْحَفُ يَضُمُّ مَقْتَنَيَاتٍ أَثَرِيَّةً قَدِيمَةً وَصُوَرًا نَادِرَةً.
sentences.translation: Muzej je sadržavao stare arheološke predmete i rijetke fotografije.
sentences.translationEn: The museum contained old archaeological artefacts and rare photographs.

sentences.arabic: اسْتَمَعْنَا إِلَى شَرْحِ الْمُرْشِدِ السِّيَاحِيِّ بِاهْتِمَامٍ.
sentences.translation: Pažljivo smo slušali objašnjenje turističkog vodiča.
sentences.translationEn: We listened carefully to the tour guide's explanation.

sentences.arabic: قَضَيْنَا ثَلَاثَ سَاعَاتٍ فِي الْمَتْحَفِ وَخَرَجْنَا سُعَدَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Proveli smo tri sata u muzeju i izašli sretni.
sentences.translationEn: We spent three hours in the museum and left happy.
